step_rationale: Regulates diacylglycerol-dependent signaling; modulates platelet hyperreactivity.
mechanism: Diacylglycerol kinase dysregulation promotes platelet hyperreactivity in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Glycoursodeoxycholic Acid Alleviates Arterial Thrombosis via Suppressing Diacylglycerol Kinases Activity in Platelet.
